productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Striped Black TShirt
description: Composition Black and grey striped polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a black collar with a stitch design, long sleeves with black cuffs and stitch design, buttoned chest placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron do not iron on decorations Slip into this fashionable yet comfortable black and grey striped polo t-shirt from united colors of benetton and you are sure to be the talk of the town. The branding and stripes make a statement, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
